# LYL Clean Air

## Company Entity
Guangdong LiangYueLiang Optoelectronics Technology Co., Ltd. operates LYL Clean Air, an OEM/ODM air purifier manufacturer for global B2B buyers. The site helps distributors, wholesalers, importers, e-commerce sellers, Amazon sellers and private-label brands source HEPA air purifier product lines, replacement filters and customization support.

## Product Categories
- HEPA air purifiers for bedroom, small room, living room, office and family use.
- Desktop and portable air purifiers for online retail and entry-level private-label launches.
- Cylindrical and tower air purifiers with H13/H14 HEPA and activated carbon filter options.
- Air purifier humidifier combo and 3-in-1 air purifier humidifier aroma diffuser concepts.
- Pet odor, smoke, dust, allergy and large-room air purifier positioning.
- Replacement filter programs for repeat purchase and after-sales support.

## OEM/ODM Services
LYL Clean Air supports model selection, logo customization, product color discussion, control-panel label planning, private-label packaging, user manual and carton details, plug standard discussion, sample confirmation, quote packs, bulk-order preparation and long-term replacement filter supply. Buyers should share target country, sales channel, estimated quantity, certification needs, plug type, packaging requirements and preferred product function.

## Certification Support
Certification and compliance support is discussed by model and target market. Unified certification wording on this site: CE / FCC / RoHS / CARB / ETL / ISO9001. The website does not publish or invent certificate numbers. Buyers should request current model-specific documents before sampling or bulk order.

## Target Buyers
Primary buyers include air purifier distributors, home appliance wholesalers, importers, Amazon FBA sellers, Shopify/DTC brands, private-label brands, retail sourcing managers and project buyers needing factory-direct OEM/ODM support.

## Contact
- Email: will@lyluv.com
- WhatsApp: +86 13928231487
- WhatsApp quick message: Hello LYL Clean Air, I am interested in your OEM/ODM air purifier products. Please send me product catalog, quotation details, MOQ, customization options and lead time.

## FAQ Summary
- LYL Clean Air supports private-label and OEM/ODM air purifier projects including logo, packaging, manual, carton and filter planning.
- Buyers can request model recommendations by sending country, quantity, target channel, plug standard and certification needs.
- Trial orders may be discussed depending on model and customization scope; bulk-order terms should be confirmed during quotation.
- H13 HEPA is commonly used for consumer air purifier projects; H14 can be discussed for premium or specialized applications.
- Replacement filters can be planned together with purifier orders to support after-sales service and repeat revenue.
- Certification support should be confirmed by model and target market before production.
